## SpatialThinker: 3D Reasoning in Multimodal LLMs

Enhance multimodal LLMs with 3D spatial reasoning capabilities through reward signals that reinforce geometric understanding.

### Core Concept

Reward-driven enhancement of spatial reasoning in multimodal systems

### Key Techniques

This skill focuses on implementing approaches from research in agent reasoning, model optimization, and system scaling.

### Implementation

For implementation details, refer to the source paper at https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.07403

### Practical Guidance

- **When to use**: When working with 3D content or spatial understanding in multimodal models
- **Integration**: Use with other agent skills for comprehensive systems
- **Scaling**: Consider performance trade-offs when applying at scale

### Reference

Paper: SpatialThinker: Reinforcing 3D Reasoning in Multimodal LLMs via Spatial Rewards
arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.07403
